purpose_context: Charter state is spread across governance.yaml, directives.yaml, metadata.yaml, and references.yaml. That split is a standing source of drift and stopgaps: the freshness signal hashes a file that is not part of the derived set, and references.yaml doubles as the ID-parity authority. Consolidating into a single compiled charter.yaml removes the split-brain, collapses the fail-closed workarounds, and gives charter-state consumers one structured source of truth.
purpose_tldr: Replace the four split charter bundle files with one authoritative charter.yaml so freshness, parity, and resolving can no longer silently drift.
